card_description: The Gold Fish Girl is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick explores the idea that 3-74 was an "override" of his regular social/political programming."

linked_segments.summary: Dick explores the idea that 3-74 was an "override" of his regular social/political programming. He theorizes that he was "switched" from an alternate track (Black Iron Prison/Soviet agent) to a new on
